name: Salsa Di Spinaci Con Uova
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the olive oil, lemon juice, capers, spinach and lettuce in a food processor.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Season well with salt and pepper.
4. Cook the pasta until al dente.
5. Heat the spinach puree slightly, being careful not to overcook or burn it.
6. Add to well drained pasta and combine.
7. Garnish with parsley.
Adapted from Sue Lloyd & Jacquie Keys, "A Passion for Pasta".
